items.title: Savannah Guthrie 'Plans to Return' on Air to “Today” Show but No Date Announced as She 'Remains Focused' on Mom Nancy and Family
items.description: A 'Today' spokesperson confirmed Guthrie's plans after she made a visit to Studio 1A on the morning of March 5

items.title: Savannah Guthrie Returns to “Today” Show Studio for First Time Since Mom Nancy’s Disappearance 33 Days Ago
items.description: Nancy Guthrie was reported missing on Feb. 1 when she failed to attend a virtual church service

items.title: Lily Allen Wears Dress Adorned with Receipts and Lyrics While Singing About Infidelity Following David Harbour Split
items.description: Allen kicked off her West End Girl tour on March 2 and will visit several U.K. locations before heading to North America

items.title: Jenna Bush Hager Tears Up on Air over Savannah Guthrie’s Emotional Return to “Today” Show Set: ‘We’ve All Been Waiting for Her’
items.description: Guthrie visited Studio 1A on Thursday, March 5, more than one month after her mother, Nancy Guthrie, was abducted from her Arizona home

items.title: Taylour Paige Says Keke Palmer Made Her Laugh So Hard Filming “I Love Boosters”, She Peed Herself: 'I Had to Go Home'
items.description: Palmer and Paige are members of a group of "professional shoplifters" in the new comedy
